hero.text: Every day is a fresh start.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is about embracing your personal power.
aries.love: A rekindled passion brings a surge of energy.
aries.career: New opportunities arise; don't be afraid to take the lead.

taurus.general: Focus on stability and comfort; they will guide you.
taurus.love: Explore shared interests to strengthen your bond.
taurus.career: Patience pays off; great advancements are on the horizon.

gemini.general: Communication is key; express yourself clearly.
gemini.love: An unexpected encounter might spark interest.
gemini.career: Collaboration will lead to innovative solutions.

cancer.general: Connect with your emotions; they are your strength today.
cancer.love: Open up to your partner about your feelings.
cancer.career: Creative endeavors will yield positive results.

leo.general: Confidence will attract opportunities; shine bright.
leo.love: Make time for romance and fun with your partner.
leo.career: Your ideas will be well received; present boldly.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will bring rewards; stay focused.
virgo.love: Talk openly about your future to align your goals.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will be invaluable today.

libra.general: Seek balance in all aspects of your life.
libra.love: A harmonious conversation will deepen your connection.
libra.career: Networking may lead to exciting prospects.

scorpio.general: Embrace your intensity; it drives passion.
scorpio.love: A transformative conversation can enhance your relationship.
scorpio.career: Trust your instincts when making decisions.

sagittarius.general: Adventure is calling; don't hesitate to explore.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity will spark joy in your relationship.
sagittarius.career: Take calculated risks; they may lead to success.

capricorn.general: Hard work will lead to recognition; stay the course.
capricorn.love: Dedicate quality time to strengthen your bond.
capricorn.career: Leadership qualities will shine through today.

aquarius.general: Innovation and creativity are highlighted today.
aquarius.love: Be open to unconventional ideas in your relationship.

pisces.general: Trust your intuition; it will guide you forward.
pisces.love: A romantic gesture will revive your connection.
pisces.career: Your empathy will be a tremendous asset today.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot, but make it hot by striking.
professional.author: William Butler Yeats

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
professional.author: Robert Collier

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe in yourself and you'll be unstoppable.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: It’s not about ideas. It’s about making ideas happen.
tech.author: Scott Belsky

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Technology will never replace great teachers, but technology in the hands of great teachers is transformational.
tech.author: George Couros

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me KitKat ads.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I’m reading a book on anti-gravity. It’s impossible to put down!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I’m on a whiskey diet. I’ve lost three days already.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie ten Boom

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you would rather have talked.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle
